deploy.startCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "worker" ]; then php artisan schedule:work & php artisan queue:work --queue=telegram --tries=3 --timeout=30; else php artisan migrate --force && (php artisan telegram:set-webhook || true) && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache && php -S 0.0.0.0:$PORT -t public; fi
